command: In the Maestro app left sidebar, hold the Control key and click on the agent named 'Noise Agency'. A context menu should appear. Click 'Remove Agent'. Then in the confirmation dialog, click 'Agent Only'.

result.prompt_sent: In the Maestro app left sidebar, hold the Control key and click on the agent named 'Noise Agency'. A context menu should appear. Click 'Remove Agent'. Then in the confirmation dialog, click 'Agent Only'.
